creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #209)

It makes me wonder if anyone from FreeBSD has tried contacting ThunderBolt regarding this situation. It has been going on for over two years with no apparent fix in sight.

I still do not understand why this problem existed before to ver 12.x. It just doesn't make sense to me. It is almost like FreeBSD is going backward in terms of hardware support.
